title: NEO Magazine Rebuild 222 Cover FeaturePictures inside
display_title: NEO Magazine Rebuild 222 Cover FeaturePictures inside
wikitext:
[]: NEO Magazine Rebuild 2.22 Cover-Feature(Pictures inside)             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon May 02, 2011 8:07 am I don´t know if somebody here reads NEO(UK Manga/Anime/Asian Film mag), but I just got my copy per mail and I was pretty surprised when I saw the cover and the featuring article: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Mon May 02, 2011 8:37 am oh yeah, I think I saw this at airport about... week ago? two? Was it when I was leaving to Japan or returning, gahh can't remember. But yeah, looked interesting but I didn't buy it in the end as I was in hurry...

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Mon May 02, 2011 8:42 am Xard wrote: oh yeah, I think I saw this at airport about... week ago? two?

[]: !             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon May 02, 2011 1:00 pm Good stuff, looks interesting. :) Thanks for posting! (I guess this would only be available at U.S. airports or something??)

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Mon May 02, 2011 6:51 pm Nice. Is there anyway to get this?

[]: Re: !             Quote Post by soul.assassin » Tue May 03, 2011 10:53 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Good stuff, looks interesting. :) Thanks for posting! (I guess this would only be available at U.S. airports or something??)

[]:             Quote Post by Xous » Wed May 04, 2011 10:03 pm Part of the article strikes me as odd: "... and Kaji is seen in a frenzied shoot-out with an unidentified assailant." (From the last image, about what to expect in Q.) Is that what the trailer was implying? Because all I saw was Kaji yelling and pointing a gun. Really, the whole Kaji clip made me think he was just angry with someone and threatening them more than being in a shoot-out with an assassin... Though of course either could be right or wrong. Maybe I missed something. Anyway, interesting article.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Thu May 05, 2011 7:19 am Yeah, ive always assumed that part of the trailer was Kaji threatening Misato to get her to stop doing whatever it is she doing in the shot before (trying to move, pull, push or open something to my mind). I.e. some sort of 'if you do that, we'll *all* die' kinda thing.

[]:             Quote Post by Tarnsman » Thu May 05, 2011 11:01 am I like how Mari's description in this is longer than her scenes in the movie.
